title: Command Cockpit Viewport Lock
summary: Locked the Command Cockpit selected-lane surface into a bounded one-screen stack so the operator keeps context while the mounted stage owns the scroll.
proof: Scoped the Command Cockpit detail panel to a fixed-height grid with hidden outer overflow, reducing nested page scrolling.
Turned the selected lane detail content into a column stack and let the mounted stage flex into the remaining space as the only internal scroll surface.
Added a Command Cockpit-only animated runner to the active Overview module button so module switching reads as a game-board action.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the viewport lock unlock.
